Step 1: Analyze Old Plans. History shows one successful attempt: initial bridge on ['Pd', 'Pd'] with index [0], relaxed to hollow (FCC/No-Subsurf) (Pd,Pd,Zr,Zr), E=-5.696 eV, marked as new best. Zr is more oxophilic than Pd, so may yield stronger binding. No termination needed as this is a distinct site and heterogeneity suggests possible lower energy.
